text.title: Annual ↔ Quarterly OKR Stitch Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the cascade file shape, the quarterly stitch-review log, and the audit-output contract.

list.item: objectives (array; each with obj_id, text, quarter_krs)
objectives[].quarter_krs (object: Q1..Q4 → array of KR objects)
retire_decisions (array; per-quarter retire entries with rationale and approver)

section.title: Quarterly stitch-review log fields

list.item: orphan_krs_found (array; each with KR text and disposition: tagged_internal / dropped / new_bet_opened)

section.reference: Markdown template for the review log.

list.item: nonexistent_bet_references (array; KRs referencing a bet_id not in any cascade file)

antipattern.description: Cascade file with an objective lacking quarter_krs for any of Q1..Q4 (an objective skipping a quarter without explicit retire).
antipattern.reason: r4 violation. Skipping a quarter requires explicit retirement OR extension, not silent gap.

antipattern.description: KR with bet_id pointing to a bet that does not exist in any cascade file.
Cascade file has > 3 KRs in a single quarter for a single objective.
antipattern.reason: r5 violation. Cap is 3 KRs per bet-objective-quarter.

antipattern.description: Stitch-review log missing signoff for a planning meeting that took place.
antipattern.reason: r3 violation. Review must be recorded and signed.

list.item: Every bet has a unique bet_id.
Every KR for the active quarter has a bet_id.
Coupling-audit clean before the planning meeting commits OKRs.
Quarter review log committed to the planning repo.
